description: 条件に合う行や要素だけを残す操作を指します。SQLでは WHERE 句で条件を指定し、大量のデータから必要な部分だけを取り出すのに使います。

example_natural.english: Filter the list to show only active users.
example_natural.japanese: 有効なユーザーだけを表示するようにリストを絞り込んでください。

example_programming.body:
-- filter
SELECT id, name
FROM users
WHERE status = 'active'
ORDER BY id;

users = [{'id': 1, 'status': 'active'}, {'id': 2, 'status': 'inactive'}]
active = [u for u in users if u['status'] == 'active']
print(active)

Function FilterActive(users As Collection) As Collection
  Dim result As New Collection
  Dim u As Variant
  For Each u In users
    If u.status = "active" Then
      result.Add u
    End If
  Next
End Function
